text.title: ADR Consequence Evidence Binding Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

conclusion.verdict: skip — use a plain ADR or RFC

branch.question: Is CI / monitoring available to capture the signal?

conclusion.verdict: author ADR with evidence anchors + thresholds
establish anchor source first, then write ADR

example.trace: input matches `measurable == true` → sub-question → `infra_available == true` → conclusion ref=`evidence-anchor-per-consequence`.
